title: FX Brief — 26 Jun 2026
intro:
USD broad-based weakness across majors as risk sentiment stabilizes, with JPY showing mixed performance amid intervention concerns at 161.70 level.
💪 CURRENCY RANKING
EUR +0.21% — Rebounding against USD on improved eurozone sentiment and dovish Fed expectations
GBP +0.21% — Matching euro strength with cable recovery, outperforming commodity currencies on UK data resilience
CHF +0.43% — Safe haven bid supporting franc amid USD weakness, EUR/CHF declining
CAD +0.25% — Oil-linked loonie recovering modestly despite broader commodity currency weakness
JPY -0.04% — Trapped near intervention zone at 161.70, BoJ policy uncertainty limiting directional conviction
NZD +0.05% — Marginal recovery after 1.52% weekly selloff, underlying weakness persists
AUD -0.07% — Underperforming on China growth concerns, 1.54% weekly decline continuing
USD -0.17% — Generalized weakness as dollar index retreats, Fed rate cut pricing increasing

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EUR/USD 1.1378 +0.21% | LONG | S:1.1340 R:1.1425 — USD weakness driving recovery from weekly losses
GBP/USD 1.3194 +0.21% | LONG | S:1.3150 R:1.3240 — Cable reclaiming 1.32 handle on dollar softness
USD/JPY 161.6980 -0.04% | SHORT | S:162.50 R:160.80 — Intervention risk rising above 162.00
AUD/USD 0.6895 -0.07% | NEUTRAL | S:0.6850 R:0.6940 — Consolidating after sharp weekly decline
🔄 CROSS PAIRS
EUR/GBP 0.8622 -0.03% | SHORT | S:0.8680 R:0.8580 — Sterling outperformance trend continuing
GBP/AUD 1.9141 +0.31% | LONG | S:1.9050 R:1.9250 — Aussie weakness favoring pound crosses

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: EUR/USD | 1.1375 | 1.1340 | 1.1450 | USD weakness continuation, eurozone data improving
LONG: GBP/JPY | 213.30 | 212.50 | 215.00 | Sterling strength plus yen intervention fears
SHORT: USD/JPY | 161.70 | 162.50 | 160.50 | Authorities signaling discomfort, technical resistance
SHORT: AUD/NZD | 1.2210 | 1.2260 | 1.2120 | Both weak but aussie underperforming on China fears
